name: discrepancyHold-edge-minor
rationale: Broker correction adjusts loan_application doc value by a small percentage (<30% threshold). loan_app: $280,000; broker correction: $290,000 (3.6% delta). F2.DH discrepancyHold should remain OFF because delta is below threshold; preliminary-review email auto-fires; broker correction is the authoritative source via R10-G push but not flagged as major discrepancy. Edge-case probe for R10-F asymmetric-gate threshold semantics.
notes: Two-event sequence. Distinguishes minor (no hold) from major (hold) discrepancy — pair with B01 to bracket threshold behavior.
